title: Don't get used to cheap AI - Axios
full_text: State of play: New models from OpenAI, Google and Anthropic are generally getting faster and cheaper. - The industry was fixated on training chips. Now Nvidia and its rivals are focused on inference— the computing that lets models answer your questions. - Aggregate token pricing — the cost of gener.
